name: Martha Washington Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 can Sweetened condensed milk (not evaporated milk)
recipeInstructions:
Combine the powdered sugar, melted butter, coarsely chopped pecans, and sweetened condensed milk. Roll into balls and chill.
Melt paraffin and chocolate chips in a double boiler over barely simmering water. Use forks to dip the chilled balls into the chocolate mixture. Let cool on a tray covered with waxed paper.
Note: You can substitute 1 tablespoon plus 1 teaspoon shortening for the paraffin. Place chocolate and shortening in a small heat-proof bowl. Add 100-110 degree (very warm) water to a larger bowl. Place the bowl with chocolate inside the larger bowl and stir constantly until melted, taking care not to get any water in the chocolate. If water cools, replace with more very warm water.
